components.name: CCtnVb
components.content:
Use this service to find out the risk of radon at your address.

The radon risk report will tell you how likely your address is above the recommended level for radon, called the action level.

components.name: Nzuthm
components.content: The action level for radon is 200 becquerels per cubic metre. A becquerel is a measure or radioactivity. If the radon level of your property is higher than this, you should take steps to reduce this.

components.name: DIJjRU
components.content:
The report tells you the risk that the address may have high levels of radon, but it doesn't tell you the actual radon level. The only way to know this for sure is to measure the level of radon in the property.

You can search for a home or small workplace under 25 metres long.

This service costs £3.90 per property.

It should take about 5 minutes.

You will be sent your risk report using your chosen delivery method.

Read a sample report

Before you start

You'll need:

  • the address for the risk report
  • your email address
  • the address you would like the report sent to (optional)
  • your payment details

pages.title: What address are you ordering a risk report for?
